title: AI Contribution Verifier
welcome: How can I help verify technical capabilities today?
welcomeDesc: Perform repository audits, verify developer proof-of-work, and analyze skill graphs. Select a suggestion or start typing below.

placeholders.input: Ask CVerify to analyze a repository (e.g. 'Perform a code quality audit on github.com/user/repo')...
placeholders.streaming: CVerify is analyzing repository technical depth...

suggestions.kyotoDesc: Suggest a technical depth audit for a software repository...
suggestions.kyotoPrompt: Perform a technical depth audit of a software repository, focusing on architectural patterns, modularity, and test coverage.
suggestions.yosemiteDesc: Verify developer Git contributions and commit history...
suggestions.yosemitePrompt: Analyze Git contribution histories and verify developer authorship and complexity levels of pull requests.
suggestions.romeDesc: Build an evidence-based skill graph for a candidate...
suggestions.romePrompt: Generate an evidence-based professional skill graph for a candidate based on verified GitHub pull requests.

errors.failedToStream: Could not connect to the AI stream. Please check your network connection.
